title: Mildly Spicy Egyptian Chicken Kebabs
description: Buttery and bouncy, these crowd-pleasing kebabs feature a miso marinade and salsa, perfect for a raw-friendly Egyptian dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat, then thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush the kebabs with butter.
Serve the kebabs hot with salsa spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
